allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix(quiz): improve mobile UX with Lucide icons and responsive layout

- Replace all emojis with Lucide React icons across 8 quiz steps
- Update SelectionCard: remove truncate, increase padding for readability
- Change mobile layout to 1 column vertical for better touch targets
- Fix LockedRoutinePreview CTA overflow with responsive text/padding
- Icons: AgeStep, ProfessionStep, WorkScheduleStep, EnergyPeakStep,
  TimeAvailableStep, ObjectiveStep, ChallengesStep, WeekDaysStep

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix(habit-forms): improve UX with scroll reset, safe-area, and opaque header

- Add scroll-to-top when changing steps in CreateHabit and EditHabit
- Add safe-area-inset-top padding for iPhone notch support
- Make header opaque on scroll to prevent content overlap
- Add smooth transition for header background change

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
